## Problem and scope

Describe the user problem, requested outcome, and explicit non-goals.

## Change

List the coherent changes and why each is needed.

## Evidence

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] Narrow behavior or regression test
- [ ] Clean install/package check when relevant
- [ ] Provider/app/support claims verified end to end when relevant

Paste concise command results or link sanitized artifacts.

## Risk and rollback

Describe security, compatibility, data, authority, and rollback considerations.

## Clean-room and license

- [ ] No third-party prompt, code, script, or asset was copied without a file-level license review and required notices.
- [ ] Prior-art links and commit identifiers are recorded when behavior patterns informed the change.
